name: beaver
description: Skills for system design, software architecture, and specs — structure before code.

interface.shortDescription: System design, software architecture, and specs — structure before code.
interface.longDescription: Six skills: defining-products (idea → PRD with a prioritized feature list and stable requirement IDs), designing-systems (idea → decision-grade high-level design with a constraint register and building-block selections), architecting-software (Clean Architecture standard + existing-codebase dependency audit), specifying-features (feature → spec with executable acceptance criteria and a Definition of Done), crafting-code (process gate, four quality pillars, and a simplicity ladder), and verifying-completion (evidence-backed completion gate and traceability report).
defaultPrompt: Design the system for this project.
